queries.name: Students Who are Inelligable to Register
queries.description: This will grab any student who is no longer able to register for classes.

columns.name: STVASTD_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the academic standing code referenced in the General Student, Registration and Academic History Modules. Required Value: 00 - Good Standing.

columns.name: STVASTD_DESC
columns.description: This field specifies the academic standing (e.g. deans list, academic warning, probation) associated with the standing code.

columns.name: STVASTD_PROBATION_IND
columns.description: This field identifies whether academic standing indicates academic probation. Y - Probation indicated.

columns.name: STVASTD_PREVENT_REG_IND
columns.description: This field identifies whether academic standing prohibits registration. Y - Registration prohibited.

columns.name: STVASTD_MAX_REG_HOURS
columns.description: This field identifies the maximum number of hours for which a student may register under the associated academic standing.

columns.name: STVASTD_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the most recent date a record was created or updated.

columns.name: STVASTD_DEANS_LIST_IND
columns.description: This field identifies whether academic standing indicates deans list.

columns.name: STVASTD_EDI_EQUIV
columns.description: EDI/SPEEDE value for the academic standing code that equates to the acdemic standing code. Refer to the SPEEDE Implementation Guide, with data element #641 for valid values.

columns.name: STVASTD_VR_MSG_NO
columns.description: The Voice Response message number assigned to the recorded message that describes the academic standing code.

columns.name: STVASTD_MIN_REG_HOURS
columns.description: MINIMUM HOURS: This field identifies the minimum number of hours for which a student may register under the associated academic standing.

columns.name: STVASTD_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: The user ID of the person who inserted or last updated this record.

columns.name: STVASTD_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: DATA ORIGIN: Source system that created or updated the data.

columns.name: STVASTD_GUID
columns.description: GUID: GUID storage for academic standings resource.
